## Missing song details

- UIL code (if known):
- Instrument/category:
- Event:
- Title:

- Arranger (if applicable):
- Publisher(s):
- Class level:

## Verified working link

Paste the best working link for this song (store page, publisher page, or public domain PDF).

## Source verification

Share the source used to confirm the song belongs on the current UIL list (UIL page, PDF, or other reference).

## Extra notes

Anything else that helps with import/matching (alternate spellings, editions, etc.).
